texto: - So, Ronnie - Garret spoke up - , are you a local? - Yes, for good or bad reasons. - said Ronnie. - Aw, come on now, there has to be some sort of redeeming factor, right, Tyler? - Exactly! - Tyler agreed. - Well, I live with my family, they all love me, but outside of it I have close to zero support. Most people are just... awful. - said Ronnie. - Avoid being too critical of human society. I may run the risk of saying a cliché, but regardless of the fact that our society can be likened to a disease, there are always notable exceptions that exist. - said Tyler.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Momchil Yoskov que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “- So, Ronnie - Garret spoke up - , are you a local? - Yes, for good or bad reasons. - said Ronnie…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, inheritance, ronnie-mason, com foco em ronnie-mason e society.
